decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, suggesting markets may be closed or feeds are delayed. Cash sits at $477.14 — just $23 below the $500 threshold for new buys — so no new positions are opened this session. The portfolio is performing strongly at +31.6% overall, and the six current positions (QQQ, EAT, OLED, WT, ROAD, INOD) continue to run; no stop-loss or profit-target triggers are apparent, so holding steady is the right call.

market_education.summary_en: Market data was unavailable for today's session, with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 showing 0.0% moves and no news feeds populated. This can occur on lighter-volume trading days or when data providers experience delays. Without directional signals, the prudent stance is to maintain existing positions and avoid overtrading on incomplete information.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據無法取得，那斯達克與標普500均顯示0.0%漲跌，新聞來源亦付之闕如。此類情況多見於交易量較低的交易日，或資料提供商出現延誤時。在缺乏明確方向訊號的情況下，維持現有部位、避免在資訊不完整時過度操作，是最審慎的應對策略。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag refers to the performance penalty a portfolio suffers when idle cash sits uninvested instead of working in the market. Our $477 in cash earns nothing while the market moves, slightly diluting overall returns. The $500 buy threshold exists to prevent deploying tiny sums with high transaction overhead, but over time keeping too much idle cash erodes the portfolio's ability to compound.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）是指投資組合因持有閒置現金而承受的績效損失——這些資金未能投入市場，無法產生報酬，從而稀釋整體收益。本組合目前持有477美元現金，雖略低於500美元的買入門檻，但長期而言，過多閒置資金會阻礙複利增長的效率。設立門檻的用意是避免因小額交易帶來過高的執行成本，屬於合理的風控安排。
